title: onobrychis squarrosa
intro: Onobrychis squarrosa, also known as squarrose broomrape, is a plant species in the legume family that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are often used to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to improve immune function, reduce pain, and promote cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Onobrychis squarrosa is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
